P1_Criteria: Critical signals requiring immediate attention: CEO/CFO/C-suite leadership changes, major stock drops (>10%), bankruptcy filings, hostile takeovers, major lawsuits or regulatory actions, product recalls, or severe reputational crises.
P2_Criteria: Significant business events to monitor closely: IPOs, major funding rounds (Series B+), strategic partnerships, mergers & acquisitions, significant market expansion, large contract wins, or notable competitor moves.
P3_Criteria: Routine informational news: minor product updates, general industry news, small funding announcements (Seed/Series A), routine earnings reports, awards/recognition, or general company announcements with low urgency.
